name: aurora-search-results
title: Aurora Search Results
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Reusable grouped result list with active, empty, metadata, and keyboard-friendly option semantics.

files.content:
"use client"

export {
  Listbox as SearchResults,
  ListboxGroup as SearchResultsGroup,
  ListboxItem as SearchResultItem,
  type ListboxItemProps as SearchResultItemProps,
} from "./listbox"

docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/search-results.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-listbox`.
